# IEA World Energy Outlook 2024

The [[iea]] World Energy Outlook 2024 projects the global energy landscape. Analyzes prospects for [[photovoltaic-cell]], [[wind-energy]], and [[nuclear-fusion]]. Projects continued [[battery-technology]] cost decline.
